expectations.evidence: Reduced from ~340 words to ~100 words (71% reduction). Clear success on conciseness.
Uses clear headers (Features, Requirements, Installation, Usage), bulleted list for features, concise command descriptions
Eliminates 'has been developed', 'users will find it beneficial', 'leverage', 'streamlined and efficient manner', passive voice throughout
Retains installation instructions, all 4 commands (transform, validate, export, merge), requirements (Python 3.9+, macOS/Linux)
